overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 152 条，入选 18 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布来源索引初始化记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 152 candidates and 18 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes source-index records instead of fake news.
